top3.sql:
SELECT T.team_long_name
FROM Team T
JOIN Match M ON T.team_api_id = M.away_team_api_id
GROUP BY T.team_long_name
ORDER BY SUM(M.away_team_goal) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T.team_long_name
FROM Team T
JOIN Match M ON T.team_api_id = M.away_team_api_id
GROUP BY T.team_long_name
HAVING SUM(M.away_team_goal) = (
    SELECT MAX(total_goals)
    FROM (
        SELECT SUM(M2.away_team_goal) AS total_goals
        FROM Match M2
        JOIN Team T2 ON T2.team_api_id = M2.away_team_api_id
        GROUP BY T2.team_long_name
    )
);

SELECT T.team_long_name
FROM Team T
JOIN Match M ON T.team_api_id = M.away_team_api_id
GROUP BY T.team_long_name
ORDER BY SUM(M.away_team_goal) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T.team_long_name
FROM Team T
JOIN Match M ON T.team_api_id = M.away_team_api_id
GROUP BY T.team_long_name
HAVING SUM(M.away_team_goal) = (
    SELECT MAX(total_goals)
    FROM (
        SELECT SUM(M2.away_team_goal) AS total_goals
        FROM Match M2
        JOIN Team T2 ON T2.team_api_id = M2.away_team_api_id
        GROUP BY T2.team_long_name
    )
);

SELECT T.team_long_name
FROM Team T
JOIN Match M ON T.team_api_id = M.away_team_api_id
GROUP BY T.team_long_name
ORDER BY SUM(M.away_team_goal) DESC
LIMIT 1;

final.sql:
SELECT T.team_long_name
FROM Team T
JOIN Match M ON T.team_api_id = M.away_team_api_id
GROUP BY T.team_long_name
HAVING SUM(M.away_team_goal) = (
    SELECT MAX(total_goals)
    FROM (
        SELECT SUM(M2.away_team_goal) AS total_goals
        FROM Match M2
        JOIN Team T2 ON T2.team_api_id = M2.away_team_api_id
        GROUP BY T2.team_long_name
    )
);
